title: SatelliteSim Constellation Configuration
description: Defines satellite types and constellation shells loaded at runtime by ShaderFun/SatelliteSim.

satellite_types.description: Catalogue of satellite visual/photometric models. Each constellation references one by name.

name.description: Unique identifier for this type. Constellations reference it via the 'type' field.

base_color.description: RGB tint [r, g, b] in linear [0, 1] space. Multiplied with the computed flare intensity.

cross_section_m2.description: Total reflective area in square metres. Brightness scales as sqrt(area / 10). Starlink ≈ 10, ISS ≈ 250, Reflect Mirror ≈ 2376.

diffuse.description: Isotropic Lambertian floor [0, 1]. Models structural body scatter visible from all angles. 0 = no diffuse floor.

mirror_frac.description: Fraction of the primary surface that is a near-perfect mirror [0, 1]. Adds an ultra-narrow specular spike (MIRROR_BOOST = 300×) on top of the Phong lobe. 0.97 = Reflect Mirror; 0.05 = Starlink.

constellations.description: List of constellation shells. Each shell generates a set of orbits on startup.

name.description: Display name shown in the Settings panel.

type.description: Name of a satellite_type entry. Must match exactly.

alt_km.description: Orbital altitude above the Earth's surface in kilometres. LEO: 200–2000, MEO: 2000–35786, GEO: ~35786.

incl_deg.description: Orbital inclination in degrees. Walker: fixed for all planes. RandomShell: maximum inclination (sats drawn uniformly from [0, incl_deg]). Ignored when align_terminator is true.

num_planes.description: Walker/Disk: number of orbital planes. RandomShell: ignored (total = num_planes × per_plane). Total satellites = num_planes × per_plane for all distributions.

per_plane.description: Satellites per orbital plane (Walker/Disk), or per unit for RandomShell. Total = num_planes × per_plane.

enabled.description: Whether this shell is visible on startup. Can be toggled in the Settings panel at runtime.

distribution.description: Orbit generation algorithm. Walker: regular grid. RandomShell: random RAAN + incl. Disk: concentric rings in a fixed plane.

alt_jitter_km.description: Per-satellite altitude scatter ±km (RandomShell and Disk). Walker ignores this.

raan_deg.description: Disk only: Right Ascension of the Ascending Node for the orbital plane, in degrees. Ignored when align_terminator is true.

align_terminator.description: Disk only: if true, override incl_deg and raan_deg so the orbital plane aligns with the Earth–Sun terminator and precesses at the SSO rate (~1 revolution per year). Gives a sun-synchronous orbit anchored to the day/night boundary.

num_rings.description: Disk only: number of concentric rings. 1 = single ring at alt_km. The rings are evenly spaced around alt_km by ring_spacing_km.

ring_spacing_km.description: Disk only: altitude step between consecutive rings in kilometres. Total altitude range = (num_rings - 1) × ring_spacing_km, centred on alt_km.

surface_spec.description: One reflective surface of a satellite.

attitude.description: How the surface normal is oriented each frame. NadirPointing: face toward Earth. SunTracking: track the sun. Tumbling: random spin. Perpendicular: cross(primary, nadir). AntiNadir: face away from Earth. FlatMirror45: reflect sunlight straight down. TargetedReflector: aim reflected beam at nearest night-side ground target.

spec_exp.description: Phong specular exponent. 0 = pure Lambertian diffuse. Higher values = narrower, brighter specular lobe. Typical range: 2 (broad) – 200 (near-mirror).

weight.description: Contribution weight relative to the primary surface. Primary is always 1.0. Secondary: 0 = disabled, 0.1–0.5 = partial contribution.
